tasks.intent: You are on page 1 of boat search results. Scroll to the very bottom of the page. Find page numbers (1, 2, 3...) or a 'Next' link. Click on page 2 or Next. done(success=true, summary='navigated to page 2').
You are on page 2. Scroll to the very bottom. Click page 3 or Next. done(success=true, summary='navigated to page 3').
You are on page 3. Scroll to the very bottom. Click page 4 or Next. done(success=true, summary='navigated to page 4').
Read the current page. What page number are you on? Read the URL from the address bar. How many listings are visible? done(success=true, summary='Page: <N>, URL: <url>, Listings: <count>').
